xwikidoc.name: DiagramPicker
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: DiagramPicker
xwikidoc.content:
{{velocity}} #macro (prepareJson, $queryResult $jsonArray) #foreach ($row in $queryResult) #set ($type = $row.get(2)) #set ($fullReference = $NULL) #set ($prettyName = $NULL) #if ("$type" == "ATTACHMENT") #set ($attachmentParent = $xwiki.getDocument($row.get(0))) #set ($attachment = $attachmentParent.getAttachment($row.get(1))) #set ($fullReference = $services.model.serialize($attachment.getReference())) #else #set ($fullReference = $row.get(0)) #end #set ($discard = $jsonArray.add({ 'label' : $fullReference, 'value': $fullReference, 'icon' : { 'iconSetName': '', 'iconSetType': 'FONT', 'cssClass': '', 'url': '' }, 'hint' : $row.get(1) })) #end #end
#set ($filter = "$!request.filter") #if ($xcontext.action == 'get') #set ($filter = $filter.toLowerCase()) ## When we attempt to search for inline diagram, we search after ## the attachment name and the document reference. #set ($hql = "select doc.fullName, att.filename, 'ATTACHMENT' FROM XWikiDocument doc JOIN XWikiAttachment att ON att.docId = doc.id WHERE (lower(att.filename) like '%$filter%.diagram.xml' or (lower(doc.fullName) like '%$filter%' and lower(att.filename) like '%.diagram.xml')) ") #set ($hql2 = "select doc.fullName, doc.title, 'diagram' FROM XWikiDocument as doc, BaseObject as diagramObject WHERE doc.fullName = diagramObject.name and diagramObject.className = 'Diagram.DiagramClass' and doc.title like '%$filter%' and doc.fullName <> 'Diagram.DiagramTemplate' ") #set ($result = $services.query.hql($hql).setLimit(5).execute()) #set ($result2 = $services.query.hql($hql2).setLimit(5).execute()) #set ($jsonArray = []) #prepareJson($result, $jsonArray) #prepareJson($result2, $jsonArray) #jsonResponse($jsonArray) #end {{/velocity}}
